promoted_facts.fact: Franchisees received $14,396,149 more in loyalty program reimbursements than they paid in loyalty program fees during 2024
2024 fiscal year actual initial fees paid by franchisees ranged from $64,750 to $214,450
63.5% of reservations are for 1-4 nights, 10% for 30+ nights
During 2024, only 40% of all Covered Hotels exceeded the average RevPAR of $127.19
Hyatt Hotels Corporation portfolio at Dec 31 2024: 1,442 hotels, 347,301 rooms, 79 countries; 721 US hotels with 159,829 rooms
Hyatt Corporation received $129,144 in rebates from suppliers based on franchisee purchases during 2024, but used entire amount to offset System Services Costs
No franchisee has failed to communicate with franchisor within 10 weeks before issuance date
